summary: CDC BRFSS landline-only prevalence data from 1995-2010, showing modifiable risk factors for chronic diseases by topic, question, response, breakout category, and geolocation.
CDC BRFSS SMART county-level prevalence data from 2002-2010 (landline only), showing behavioral risk factor prevalence by question, class, topic, and location with confidence limits.
CDC NNDSS 2017 table of acute Hepatitis C cases (confirmed and probable), showing current week, previous 52-week median and maximum, and cumulative 2016 and 2017 counts.

CDC NNDSS 2014 table of notifiable diseases including Varicella (chickenpox) and West Nile virus (neuroinvasive and nonneuroinvasive), showing current week, previous 52-week max, and cumulative counts.
CDC STATE System tobacco control program funding data from 1991-2016, showing state appropriations and expenditures by funding cycle, source, and measure for tobacco surveillance and evaluation.

CDC PRAMS state-specific maternal attitudes and experiences data for 2007, including alcohol use, reproductive health, prenatal care, pregnancy history, sleep behavior, and smoke exposure by location.

CDC Medicare Fee-for-Service claims vision and eye health surveillance data from 2014-2022, showing diagnosed prevalence and service utilization indicators stratified by age, race/ethnicity, sex, and state.
CDC Best Practices for Comprehensive Tobacco Control Programs 2007 funding data, showing state intervention area funding amounts by measure, topic, source, and location.
CDC PRAMS state-specific maternal attitudes and experiences data for 2004, including obesity, tobacco use, stress, smoke exposure, sleep behavior, and reproductive health by breakout category.
CDC stroke mortality data for US adults 35+ from 2014-2016 (3-year average), showing age-standardized rates by sex, race/ethnicity, state/territory, and county with spatially smoothed estimates.
CDC Household Pulse Survey indicators of reduced healthcare access during COVID-19 in the last 4 weeks, showing delayed care and unmet need by indicator, group, subgroup, and time period.
CDC PRAMS state-specific maternal attitudes and experiences data for 2008, including alcohol use, abuse, pregnancy history, prenatal care, reproductive health, and sleep behavior.

CDC PRAMS state-specific maternal attitudes and experiences data for 2005, including pregnancy history, prenatal care, unintended pregnancy, WIC, reproductive health, and sleep behavior by breakout category.
CDC PRAMS state-specific maternal attitudes and experiences data for 2003, including sleep behavior, pregnancy history, prenatal care, reproductive health, alcohol use, and abuse by location.
CDC PRAMS state-specific maternal attitudes and experiences data for 2000, including obesity, unintended pregnancy, stress, smoke exposure, sleep behavior, and reproductive health.
